name: financial_services_clinical_trial_millhaven_lib_eq
premise: A prime brokerage desk discovered that margin calls were computed against stale collateral marks during a fast market. In Financial Services, the situation tagged internally around financial services clinical trial millhaven lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Millhaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. A wire, settlement, or registry window closes before the next business day begins in the primary jurisdiction. Framing has already hardened externally as liberty against equality; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Mateo Nowak
agents.identity: I am Mateo Nowak, the accountable executive on this bridge in Financial Services. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Jonah Hughes
agents.identity: I am Jonah Hughes, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Financial Services. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect equality.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to equality to secure liberty before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Mateo Nowak must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Mateo Nowak do?
